intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 1 bath REAR BEDROOMS pattern — 14x10 m lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x6 = 60 m² floor. Both bedrooms at the rear (master rear-left, standard rear-middle-right), common T&B sandwiched between them, kitchen at the rear-far-right corner. Great room (combined L+D, gr style) spans the entire front. Matches the dominant PH 60 sqm 2BR/1bath starter-home pattern.
must_haves: both bedrooms at the rear (master and standard side-by-side)
single common bath between the two bedrooms
bath publicly accessible from the great room
open-plan great room + kitchen (gr style, L+D combined)
kitchen at rear-far-right corner with dirty kitchen behind
